(rm math-3] infra mgr. fairer emf arm, W 31% MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (Railway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th September, 1989 G.S.R. 845 (E) .«In exercese of the powors confer— red by Section 11 and Clause (C2. of subsection (2) of Section 30 of the Railway C aims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the'Central Government hereby makes the following rules. namely :—~ 1. Short Title and Commencement l 9)) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tri nnal (Financial and Administrative Powers) Rules, 1989. (2) They shall come into force on the ‘appointed day' Within the meaning of Clause (b) of Section(2) of the Act. , , . "'2. In these rules. unless the context otherwise re- quires. ' ‘5' (1) "Act' means (lie'Railway Claims Tribuml Act; 1-987 (54 of 1987) ; if > II M ' ‘ '. -. ‘vt-l ‘ ., ' Financial Code, 3. Sitting of 3 Bench at a place other than the place where it ordinarily sits : If at any time, the Chairman is satisfied that circumstances exist which necessitate sittings of the Bench at any place falling in its juris- diction other than the place at which it ordinarily site, he may direct that the Bench may hold its sit» tings at any such place. i 4. Powers of Chairman riz’I‘he Chairman shall have the same powers in respec; of matters specified in the Schedule as are contorted on a General Manager of a railway administration under the Indian Railway Indian Railway Establishment Code, Railway Servants (Discipline and Appeal) Rules, 1968, Railway Servants (Conduct) Rules, 1966, and Railway Servants (Pass) Rules, 1986 : Provided that the exerciSe of the Financial powers shall be subject to any procedural or other instruc~ tions issued from time to time by the Government and after obtaining the advice of the associated Financial Adviser and Chief Accounts Officer. SCHEDULE 1. Appointments and promotions against vacanv cics in respect of sanctioned posts. , Grant of Leave. « Issue of Passes, / Establishment matters generally./ antingcnt expenditure within the amount allotted fonthis purfiose in the sanctioned grant for each year. new!“ 6.
